context_for_next_testing_agent: Dialog centering issue FIXED. CSS animation 'dialogSlideUp' was removed and replaced with opacity-only 'dialogFadeIn' to preserve the centering transform (translate(-50%, -50%)). Tested on Desktop, Samsung S24, and iPad - all CENTERED. All login flows working. Theme toggle smooth transition working.

dialog_centering.issue: Dialogs were going to corner instead of center due to CSS animation conflicting with transform
dialog_centering.fix: Removed transform-based dialogSlideUp animation, using opacity-only dialogFadeIn
